name: smarthealthconnect
description: SmartHealthConnect — personal health management skills covering preventive care gap tracking (HEDIS), medication refill monitoring, healthy habits dashboard, diet & exercise analytics, pediatric immunizations (CDC schedules + school compliance), and biomedical research / clinical trial monitoring (bioRxiv, medRxiv, ClinicalTrials.gov, OpenFDA). SMART on FHIR + MCP server with PHI redaction, audit logging, and human-in-the-loop on write tools.
